Happier news? New Racic/EchoMask collab dropped today! racicPog
I made a cool gimmick for the puzzle jam, showed it off in that server.. Echo was like "oooo lemme get my hands on that shit" and here we are LUL
Yeah there's a release package planned I think.. Pretty sure there was only 5 submissions though.
Ours is pretty short, so it only counts for half of one. But Patrick made one, so he makes up the difference.
Yeah, our collab ended up being me having made the gimmick, doing a lot of the coding and "production"... Echo cooked on the level design. (Shocking, I know.)
He's the fuckin goat, jesus
right?
He's like "this game wouldn't be what it is without you, Racic!"
Okay, yeah, I made a buncha goofy visuals and cutscenes and a bunch of, you know, NON-GAMEPLAY.
LUL
It's what I do best. racicThumbs

For sure! My goal is to make my stuff be a fun experience. Will I change the world and be heralded as OMG BEST MAKER EVER with a CN2.5 scope magnum opus? Fuck no. But will I make shit that'll hopefully have people smiling and/or laughing and/or possibly exhaling loudly from their nostrils? That's the goal. 💪🏻
The clouds?! Bro, if I can just get off the ground I'm happy. LUL
Anyways, good luck on this, I gotta dip. Lurk time, broski. racicHood
